---
title: "Notebooks"
subtitle: "Énoncés des séances pratiques"
toc: false
---

::: {.casc-info-banner}
<i class="bi bi-info-circle-fill"></i>

Pour télécharger un notebook, **cliquez-droit** sur le lien et choisissez « Enregistrer le lien sous… ». Les soumissions s'effectuent via [Educnet](https://educnet.enpc.fr/).
:::

::: {.casc-table-wrapper}

```{=html}
<table class="casc-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th style="width: 8rem;">Semaine</th>
      <th>Sujet</th>
      <th style="width: 11rem;">Énoncé</th>
      <th style="width: 11rem;">Soumission</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="casc-week-badge">Sem. 1</span></td>
      <td class="casc-topic">Introduction au langage Julia</td>
      <td><a class="casc-action-btn primary" href="notebooks/intro_julia.ipynb" download><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-code"></i> Notebook</a></td>
      <td><a class="casc-action-btn accent" href="https://educnet.enpc.fr/mod/assign/view.php?id=75232" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-cloud-upload"></i> Educnet</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="casc-week-badge">Sem. 2</span></td>
      <td class="casc-topic">Interpolation et intégration</td>
      <td><a class="casc-action-btn primary" href="notebooks/interpolation.ipynb" download><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-code"></i> Notebook</a></td>
      <td><a class="casc-action-btn accent" href="https://educnet.enpc.fr/mod/assign/view.php?id=75420" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-cloud-upload"></i> Educnet</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="casc-week-badge">Sem. 3</span></td>
      <td class="casc-topic">Systèmes linéaires</td>
      <td><a class="casc-action-btn primary" href="notebooks/linear.ipynb" download><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-code"></i> Notebook</a></td>
      <td><span class="casc-action-btn ghost"><i class="bi bi-hourglass-split"></i> à venir</span></td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::
